channel.title: GitHub Dart Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Dart in GitHub

item.title: ReVanced/revanced-manager
item.description: 💊 Application to use ReVanced on Android

item.title: localsend/localsend
item.description: An open-source cross-platform alternative to AirDrop

item.title: hiddify/hiddify-app
item.description: Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

item.title: jing332/AListFlutter
item.description: AList 安卓版本，APK安装即用，无需Root或Termux。

item.title: lollipopkit/flutter_server_box
item.description: ServerBox - server status & toolbox

item.title: Predidit/Kazumi
item.description: 基于自定义规则的番剧采集APP，支持流媒体在线观看，支持弹幕。

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: FOSS, End to End Encrypted alternative to Google Photos and Apple Photos

item.title: xiaoyaocz/dart_simple_live
item.description: 简简单单的看直播

item.title: arianneorpilla/jidoujisho
item.description: A full-featured immersion language learning suite for mobile.

item.title: Sub6Resources/flutter_html
item.description: A Flutter widget for rendering static html as Flutter widgets (Will render over 80 different html tags!)

item.title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
item.description: Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is an AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The best open source alternative to Notion.

item.title: lamarios/clipious
item.description: Invidious client for android

item.title: RyanYuuki/AnymeX
item.description: An Open Source app for watching anime, reading mangas and novels

item.title: DJDoubleD/refreezer
item.description: An alternative Deezer music streaming & downloading client, based on Freezer.

item.title: TheAlphamerc/flutter_twitter_clone
item.description: Fully functional Twitter clone built in flutter framework using Firebase realtime database and storage

item.title: TheLastGimbus/GooglePhotosTakeoutHelper
item.description: Script that organizes the Google Takeout archive into one big chronological folder

item.title: Notsfsssf/pixez-flutter
item.description: 一个支持免代理直连及查看动图的第三方Pixiv flutter客户端

item.title: anandnet/Harmony-Music
item.description: A cross platform App for streaming Music

item.title: jmshrv/finamp
item.description: A Jellyfin music client for mobile

item.title: Predidit/oneAnime
item.description: 一款简洁清爽无广告的看番软件。 一款带弹幕的 anime1 第三方客户端，界面符合 Material You 规范。

item.title: foss42/apidash
item.description: API Dash is a beautiful open-source cross-platform (macOS, Windows, Linux, Android & iOS) API Client built using Flutter which can help you easily create & customize your API requests, visually inspect responses and generate API integration code. A lightweight alternative to postman/insomnia.

item.title: jiangtian616/JHenTai
item.description: A cross-platform manga app made for e-hentai & exhentai by Flutter

item.title: academind/flutter-complete-guide-course-resources
item.description: Course resources (code snapshots & slides) for our complete Flutter & Dart course (https://acad.link/flutter).
